content: Self-Refine's iterative unsupervised feedback framework can be generalized to ground multiple inconsistent perspectives in LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-reflection system that resolves the common limitation of single-perspective blind spots without requiring extra training or labeled data. This hybrid system first generates multiple conflicting reasoning perspectives via multi-perspective reflection, then uses Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback loop to refine and reconcile conflicting outputs into a more robust final result.
